tweets.text: Great to kick off @CheFrontierDays today with the Morning Star Indian Village Grand Opening. The village is absolutely stunning—and a meaningful tribute to our Native American culture. Special thanks to the Hughes family & foundation for making it possible, and to all the friends, citizens, and elected officials who celebrated with us!

tweets.text: More than 4 million people lost access to their money in 2022, and thousands are still sorting through bankruptcy claims today. Congress spent years arguing about crypto’s future while consumers waited in bankruptcy court for their own money. The Clarity Act ends the wait and ends the fight.

tweets.text: RT @FinancialCmte: WATCH: Chairman @RepFrenchHill on the urgency to pass the CLARITY Act and establish a digital asset market structure: "We are here at Federal Hall in New York to hold a field hearing to commemorate the one-year anniversary of passing CLARITY with 78 Democratic votes last summer. ...We need CLARITY in place because of a key point I always make: if you have GENIUS and dollar-backed stablecoin, which President Trump signed into law last July, but you do not have a market structure bill, you have passed authorization to have a cellphone but no cell network. There is no ecosystem to support the use. That's why it's so critical that we get the companion legislation to be married to the implementation of GENIUS and dollar-backed stablecoins." 📺⬇️
tweets.summary: RT @FinancialCmte: WATCH: Chairman @RepFrenchHill on the urgency to pass the CLARITY Act and establish a digital asset market structure: "We are here…

tweets.text: Rep. French Hill received the 2026 Best of Bipartisan Collaboration Award yesterday alongside Georgia Democrat Lucy McBath. The award, presented by the Congressional Management Foundation, recognizes congressional offices for standout work reaching across the aisle to get things done for constituents. At the ceremony, Hill noted that “good policy attracts good partners.” His recent legislative efforts, from the housing bill to the CLARITY Act to the IGNITE HBCU Excellence Act, are prime examples of how that guiding philosophy draws people in from all sides of the political aisle. #arkansas #bipartisanship
tweets.summary: Rep. French Hill received the 2026 Best of Bipartisan Collaboration Award yesterday alongside Georgia Democrat Lucy McBath. The award, presented by…

tweets.text: I am encouraged that Chair Warsh supports the goals of the Fed’s skinny master account proposal. I strongly support the Fed finalizing this rule as soon as possible. Thank you, Governor Waller, for continuing to work hard on this. Our payment system is a public good, and any financial institution— new or old— who wants to comply with the law should have access to it. We should be encouraging businesses to do this, not creating arbitrary barricades.

tweets.text: RT @HHSGov: This week, @SecKennedy joined @SecRollins at Tampa General Hospital to celebrate its commitment to healthier hospital food. Alongside Tampa General President & CEO John Couris, they toured the hospital's cafeteria, where @GZChef Geoffrey Zakarian—who redesigned the menu around the principle that food is medicine in 2025—led a cooking demonstration. They also participated in a roundtable with hospital leadership before concluding with a press conference celebrating Tampa General's signing of the Trump Administration's Make Hospital Food Healthier Pledge. Hospitals should help patients heal—and that starts with Real Food.

tweets.text: Tomorrow marks one year since my GENIUS Act became law. Before GENIUS, America lacked a clear federal framework for stablecoins, a gap that threatened innovation, competitiveness, and the long-term strength of the U.S. dollar. One year later, the United States has the first comprehensive federal framework for payment stablecoins, positioning America not just to participate in the digital asset economy, but to lead it. It was a watershed moment, and it’s only the beginning.
tweets.summary: Tomorrow marks one year since my GENIUS Act became law. Before GENIUS, America lacked a clear federal framework for stablecoins, a gap that…
